reviews.comment:
Lugar como , practico para reaprovisionar combustible,  estirar la piernas y continuar viaje .

(Translated by Google)
A place like this, practical for refueling, stretching your legs and continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3bFptSHlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si venís desde Santiago, ojalá hayas llenado combustible antes de salir, porque en esta YPF se hace una fila muy larga. Tienen una sola isla y bastante poco interés los playeros en que la gente no pierda 2hs reloj en su viaje.

(Translated by Google)
If you're coming from Santiago, I hope you filled up before leaving, because the line at this YPF station is incredibly long. They only have one pump and the attendants seem to care very little about people wasting two hours on their trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1blBTY1BBEAE

reviews.comment:
Destaco que tiene un espacio con mesas y sillas para que los viajeros puedan tomar mate o comer lo que llevan para el viaje, aunque no consuman en el bar

(Translated by Google)
I would like to highlight that it has a space with tables and chairs so that travelers can drink mate or eat what they bring for the trip, even if they do not consume at the bar.
